summary: Implemented read-only Publication Edge parsing and preflight diagnostics in @narada2/site-config. The helpers validate edge configuration, separate capability references from raw secrets, and report non-publishing preflight checks for endpoint, capability, credential freshness, event-family allowance, and target surface coherence.
residuals: Client helper enforcement remains for task 1399.
No network publish or external mutation was performed.
Credential freshness is represented through explicit preflight input/config posture; resolver integration with the capability/consent registry remains later work.
